title: All About That Bass
why_this_song: All About That Bass by Meghan Trainor (2014) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 47 times; first heard in: "Because you know I'm all about that bass, 'bout that bass, no treble"
Appears 22 times; first heard in: "Because you know I'm all about that bass, 'bout that bass, no treble"
Appears 15 times; first heard in: "Because you know I'm all about that bass, 'bout that bass, no treble"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "She says, "Boys like a little more booty to hold at night""

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: She says, "Boys like a little more booty to hold at night"
(That booty, booty, uh, that booty, booty)
And, no, I won't be no stick-figure silicone Barbie doll
So, if that's what's you're into then go ahead and move along
Because you know I'm all about that bass, 'bout that bass, no treble
I'm all about that bass, 'bout that bass, no treble

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "bass" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "All About That Bass" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "All About That Bass", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Compare "All About That Bass" with a Brazilian song you know. Do they share a theme? How do their styles differ?
exercises.prompt_pt: Compare "All About That Bass" com alguma música brasileira que você conhece. Elas compartilham algum tema? Como os estilos diferem?

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "All About That Bass", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "All About That Bass", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
